purpose: External timestamp anchor for the sovereign artifact bundle
anchor_methods: OpenTimestamps: ots stamp store/BUNDLE_ROOT  (then ots upgrade/verify)
Bitcoin OP_RETURN: broadcast a tx whose OP_RETURN output = the op_return_payload above
Ethereum: emit an event / calldata carrying the bundle_root
anchor_instructions: Run 'ots stamp store/BUNDLE_ROOT' to create an OTS proof, then 'ots verify'. To publish on-chain, broadcast an OP_RETURN tx carrying op_return_payload. Record the resulting txid and ots_proof_sha256 here.
existing_reference_anchor: Bitcoin block 943847 (frozen governance reference, not a bundle tx)
notes: The anchor txid is recorded here once broadcast.
The anchor file is intentionally separate from the bundle so it never changes the bundle root.
Independent verifiers can run 'ots verify' on the OTS proof and confirm it commits to the bundle_root.
